text:
Once upon a time, in a sleepy little town, there was a curious cat named Whiskers. He liked to explore outside, discovering new plants and birds. One sunny afternoon, he climbed up an old cherry tree.

While he rested high, he saw something strange. A flock of pigeons had fluttered together, and one flew away strangely. Interested, Whiskers gave chase.

After a few branches, he found himself in a park laden with bons bons trees. There was a pond peaceful as molusk. That's when he spotted a strange shape gliding through the reeds. It was nothing like any bird he knew.

His curiosity pounced, and he watched. The shape changed shapes. It was like a mermaid! But not mermaid clever enough. It had feathers that sang with scales. It hummed.

Whiskers knew he'd find out soon enough. Following the tune, he found himself by the lake lighthouse.

"Why such songs?" He asked.
